title: No IData cast when shift items of array.

features.name: unpacked array element as shift operand without IData cast
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array element used as the left operand of a shift operation where IData cast is not applied by the compiler

features.name: array element accessed via genvar index in shift expression
features.description: Code should include an array element accessed using a genvar index variable inside a generate block used in a shift operation
